# Stable Diffusion

Stable Diffusion is an open-source text-to-image diffusion model. Unlike [[generative-adversarial-network]], diffusion models generate images through iterative denoising. Uses cross-[[attention-mechanism]] from [[transformer-architecture]] to guide generation.
